message:
bd-ml2r.10.1: implement FNX analysis budget enforcement

Add fnx_budget module with time and work budget enforcement for FNX
analysis operations. Key components:

- AnalysisBudget: configurable time/work limits with presets (strict,
  relaxed, unlimited)
- BudgetExecutor: executes operations with budget tracking and
  cancellation detection
- BudgetResult: completed/cancelled result type with partial values
- BudgetExceededReason: structured reason codes for diagnostics
- Thread-local BudgetContext: supports nested budget scopes

Budget enforcement enables deterministic fallback behavior when FNX
analysis exceeds resource limits, preventing latency spikes on
pathological inputs.

11 unit tests covering:
- Budget configuration and presets
- Time and work tracking
- Execution within/exceeding budgets
- Nested context scopes
- Thread-local isolation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
